problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
mechanism: Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference
hypothesis: Combining Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
